mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transactions ( tenant_id, transaction_type, account_id, from_account_id, currency_id, amount, transaction_date, description, remark, created_by, updated_by, approval_status, approved_by, approved_at, bank_process_posted_id, rate_group_id ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{transactionType}, #{accountId}, #{fromAccountId}, #{currencyId}, #{amount}, #{transactionDate}, #{description}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, #{approvalStatus}, #{approvedBy}, #{approvedAt}, #{bankProcessPostedId}, #{rateGroupId} )
mapper.select:
SELECT a.id AS accountDbId, a.account_id AS accountCode, a.name AS accountName, a.role AS role, UPPER(c.code) AS currencyCode, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN t.transaction_date < #{dateFrom} THEN CASE WHEN t.transaction_type = 'WIN' THEN t.amount ELSE -t.amount END ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS bfAmount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN CASE WHEN t.transaction_type = 'WIN' THEN t.amount ELSE -t.amount END ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS winLossAmount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS periodTxnCount FROM transactions t INNER JOIN account a ON a.id = t.account_id INNER JOIN currency c ON c.id = t.currency_id AND c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.bank_process_posted_id IS NOT NULL AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND t.transaction_type IN ('WIN', 'LOSE')
AND UPPER(c.code) IN
UPPER(#{code})
AND UPPER(a.role) IN
UPPER(#{cat})
GROUP BY a.id, a.account_id, a.name, a.role, c.code ORDER BY currencyCode ASC, accountCode ASC
mapper.sql: ( t.transaction_type <> 'RATE' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM transactions_rate tr WHERE tr.tenant_id = t.tenant_id AND tr.rate_group_id = t.rate_group_id AND (t.id = tr.leg1_transaction_id OR t.id = tr.leg2_transaction_id) ) )

EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM transactions_rate tr WHERE tr.tenant_id = t.tenant_id AND tr.rate_group_id = t.rate_group_id AND tr.middleman_account_id IS NOT NULL AND t.id <> tr.leg1_transaction_id AND t.id <> tr.leg2_transaction_id )
mapper.select:
SELECT x.accountDbId AS accountDbId, x.accountCode AS accountCode, x.accountName AS accountName, x.role AS role, x.currencyCode AS currencyCode, COALESCE(SUM(x.bfPart), 0) AS bfAmount, COALESCE(SUM(x.crPart), 0) AS crDrAmount, COALESCE(SUM(x.periodCnt), 0) AS periodTxnCount FROM ( SELECT a.id AS accountDbId, a.account_id AS accountCode, a.name AS accountName, a.role AS role, UPPER(c.code) AS currencyCode, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date < #{dateFrom} THEN -t.amount ELSE 0 END AS bfPart, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN -t.amount ELSE 0 END AS crPart, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS periodCnt FROM transactions t INNER JOIN account a ON a.id = t.account_id INNER JOIN currency c ON c.id = t.currency_id AND c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.bank_process_posted_id IS NULL AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND t.transaction_type IN () AND
AND UPPER(c.code) IN
UPPER(#{code})
AND UPPER(a.role) IN
UPPER(#{cat})
UNION ALL
SELECT a.id AS accountDbId, a.account_id AS accountCode, a.name AS accountName, a.role AS role, UPPER(c.code) AS currencyCode, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date < #{dateFrom} THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END AS bfPart, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END AS crPart, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS periodCnt FROM transactions t INNER JOIN account a ON a.id = t.from_account_id INNER JOIN currency c ON c.id = t.currency_id AND c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.from_account_id IS NOT NULL AND t.bank_process_posted_id IS NULL AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND t.transaction_type IN () AND
AND UPPER(c.code) IN
UPPER(#{code})
AND UPPER(a.role) IN
UPPER(#{cat})
) x GROUP BY x.accountDbId, x.accountCode, x.accountName, x.role, x.currencyCode ORDER BY currencyCode ASC, accountCode ASC

SELECT UPPER(c.code) AS currencyCode, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN t.transaction_type = 'WIN' THEN t.amount ELSE -t.amount END ), 0) AS bfAmount FROM transactions t INNER JOIN currency c ON c.id = t.currency_id AND c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.account_id = #{accountId} AND t.bank_process_posted_id IS NOT NULL AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND t.transaction_type IN ('WIN', 'LOSE') AND t.transaction_date < #{dateFrom}
AND UPPER(c.code) IN
UPPER(#{code})
GROUP BY c.code ORDER BY currencyCode ASC

SELECT t.id AS id, t.transaction_type AS transactionType, t.amount AS amount, CASE WHEN t.transaction_type = 'WIN' THEN t.amount ELSE -t.amount END AS signedAmount, t.transaction_date AS transactionDate, t.description AS description, t.remark AS remark, t.created_by AS createdBy, t.created_at AS createdAt, UPPER(c.code) AS currencyCode, bp.card_owner AS cardOwner, TRUE AS bankProcessLine FROM transactions t INNER JOIN currency c ON c.id = t.currency_id AND c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id INNER JOIN bank_process_accounting_posted bpap ON bpap.id = t.bank_process_posted_id INNER JOIN bank_process bp ON bp.id = bpap.bank_process_id WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.account_id = #{accountId} AND t.bank_process_posted_id IS NOT NULL AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND t.transaction_type IN ('WIN', 'LOSE') AND t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo}
AND UPPER(c.code) IN
UPPER(#{code})
ORDER BY t.created_at ASC, t.id ASC

SELECT t.id AS id, t.transaction_type AS transactionType, t.amount AS amount, CASE WHEN t.account_id = #{accountId} AND t.from_account_id IS NULL AND t.description = 'RATE_MIDDLEMAN_FEE' THEN t.amount WHEN t.account_id = #{accountId} AND t.from_account_id = #{accountId} THEN 0 WHEN t.account_id = #{accountId} THEN -t.amount ELSE t.amount END AS signedAmount, t.transaction_date AS transactionDate, t.description AS description, t.remark AS remark, t.created_by AS createdBy, t.created_at AS createdAt, UPPER(c.code) AS currencyCode, NULL AS cardOwner, FALSE AS bankProcessLine, t.account_id AS toAccountId, t.from_account_id AS fromAccountId, to_a.account_id AS toAccountCode, from_a.account_id AS fromAccountCode, t.rate_group_id AS rateGroupId, COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(tr.rate_expression), ''), TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM CAST(tr.exchange_rate AS CHAR))) ) AS rateExpression, UPPER(cf.code) AS rateCurrencyFromCode, tr.amount_from AS rateAmountFrom, UPPER(ct.code) AS rateCurrencyToCode, CASE WHEN tr.middleman_account_id IS NOT NULL AND t.id <> tr.leg1_transaction_id AND t.id <> tr.leg2_transaction_id THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS rateMiddlemanFee, UPPER(leg1_to.account_id) AS rateLeg1ToAccountCode, tr.middleman_rate AS rateMiddlemanRate, CASE WHEN t.description = 'RATE_MIDDLEMAN_FEE' THEN 'FEE' WHEN t.description = 'RATE_MIDDLEMAN_RATE' THEN 'RATE' WHEN tr.middleman_rate IS NOT NULL AND tr.middleman_rate > 0 THEN 'RATE' ELSE 'FEE' END AS rateMiddlemanKind FROM transactions t INNER JOIN currency c ON c.id = t.currency_id AND c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id INNER JOIN account to_a ON to_a.id = t.account_id LEFT JOIN account from_a ON from_a.id = t.from_account_id LEFT JOIN transactions_rate tr ON tr.tenant_id = t.tenant_id AND tr.rate_group_id = t.rate_group_id LEFT JOIN currency cf ON cf.id = tr.currency_from_id AND cf.tenant_id = t.tenant_id LEFT JOIN currency ct ON ct.id = tr.currency_to_id AND ct.tenant_id = t.tenant_id LEFT JOIN transactions leg1_t ON leg1_t.id = tr.leg1_transaction_id LEFT JOIN account leg1_to ON leg1_to.id = leg1_t.account_id WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.bank_process_posted_id IS NULL AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND t.transaction_type IN () AND ( t.account_id = #{accountId} OR t.from_account_id = #{accountId} ) AND t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo}
AND UPPER(c.code) IN
UPPER(#{code})
ORDER BY t.created_at ASC, t.id ASC

SELECT a.id AS accountDbId, a.account_id AS accountCode, a.name AS accountName, a.role AS role, UPPER(c.code) AS currencyCode, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN t.transaction_date < #{dateFrom} THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS bfAmount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS winLossAmount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS periodTxnCount FROM transactions t INNER JOIN account a ON a.id = t.account_id INNER JOIN currency c ON c.id = t.currency_id AND c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.bank_process_posted_id IS NULL AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND t.transaction_type = 'ADJUSTMENT'
AND UPPER(c.code) IN
UPPER(#{code})
AND UPPER(a.role) IN
UPPER(#{cat})
GROUP BY a.id, a.account_id, a.name, a.role, c.code ORDER BY currencyCode ASC, accountCode ASC

SELECT UPPER(c.code) AS currencyCode, COALESCE(SUM(t.amount), 0) AS bfAmount FROM transactions t INNER JOIN currency c ON c.id = t.currency_id AND c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.account_id = #{accountId} AND t.bank_process_posted_id IS NULL AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND t.transaction_type = 'ADJUSTMENT' AND t.transaction_date < #{dateFrom}
AND UPPER(c.code) IN
UPPER(#{code})
GROUP BY c.code ORDER BY currencyCode ASC

SELECT t.id AS id, t.transaction_type AS transactionType, t.amount AS amount, t.amount AS signedAmount, t.transaction_date AS transactionDate, t.description AS description, t.remark AS remark, t.created_by AS createdBy, t.created_at AS createdAt, UPPER(c.code) AS currencyCode, NULL AS cardOwner, FALSE AS bankProcessLine FROM transactions t INNER JOIN currency c ON c.id = t.currency_id AND c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.account_id = #{accountId} AND t.bank_process_posted_id IS NULL AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND t.transaction_type = 'ADJUSTMENT' AND t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo}
AND UPPER(c.code) IN
UPPER(#{code})
ORDER BY t.created_at ASC, t.id ASC

SELECT x.accountDbId AS accountDbId, x.accountCode AS accountCode, x.accountName AS accountName, x.role AS role, x.currencyCode AS currencyCode, COALESCE(SUM(x.bfPart), 0) AS bfAmount, COALESCE(SUM(x.wlPart), 0) AS winLossAmount, COALESCE(SUM(x.periodCnt), 0) AS periodTxnCount FROM ( SELECT a.id AS accountDbId, a.account_id AS accountCode, a.name AS accountName, a.role AS role, UPPER(c.code) AS currencyCode, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date < #{dateFrom} THEN -t.amount ELSE 0 END AS bfPart, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN -t.amount ELSE 0 END AS wlPart, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS periodCnt FROM transactions t INNER JOIN account a ON a.id = t.account_id INNER JOIN currency c ON c.id = t.currency_id AND c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.bank_process_posted_id IS NULL AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND t.transaction_type = 'PROFIT'
AND UPPER(c.code) IN
UPPER(#{code})
AND UPPER(a.role) IN
UPPER(#{cat})
UNION ALL
SELECT a.id AS accountDbId, a.account_id AS accountCode, a.name AS accountName, a.role AS role, UPPER(c.code) AS currencyCode, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date < #{dateFrom} THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END AS bfPart, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END AS wlPart, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS periodCnt FROM transactions t INNER JOIN account a ON a.id = t.from_account_id INNER JOIN currency c ON c.id = t.currency_id AND c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.from_account_id IS NOT NULL AND t.bank_process_posted_id IS NULL AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND t.transaction_type = 'PROFIT'
AND UPPER(c.code) IN
UPPER(#{code})
AND UPPER(a.role) IN
UPPER(#{cat})
) x GROUP BY x.accountDbId, x.accountCode, x.accountName, x.role, x.currencyCode ORDER BY currencyCode ASC, accountCode ASC

SELECT t.id AS id, t.transaction_type AS transactionType, t.amount AS amount, CASE WHEN t.account_id = #{accountId} AND t.from_account_id = #{accountId} THEN 0 WHEN t.account_id = #{accountId} THEN -t.amount ELSE t.amount END AS signedAmount, t.transaction_date AS transactionDate, t.description AS description, t.remark AS remark, t.created_by AS createdBy, t.created_at AS createdAt, UPPER(c.code) AS currencyCode, NULL AS cardOwner, FALSE AS bankProcessLine, t.account_id AS toAccountId, t.from_account_id AS fromAccountId, to_a.account_id AS toAccountCode, from_a.account_id AS fromAccountCode FROM transactions t INNER JOIN currency c ON c.id = t.currency_id AND c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id INNER JOIN account to_a ON to_a.id = t.account_id LEFT JOIN account from_a ON from_a.id = t.from_account_id WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.bank_process_posted_id IS NULL AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND t.transaction_type = 'PROFIT' AND ( t.account_id = #{accountId} OR t.from_account_id = #{accountId} ) AND t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo}
AND UPPER(c.code) IN
UPPER(#{code})
ORDER BY t.created_at ASC, t.id ASC

SELECT x.accountDbId AS accountDbId, x.accountCode AS accountCode, x.accountName AS accountName, x.role AS role, x.currencyCode AS currencyCode, COALESCE(SUM(x.bfPart), 0) AS bfAmount, COALESCE(SUM(x.wlPart), 0) AS winLossAmount, COALESCE(SUM(x.periodCnt), 0) AS periodTxnCount FROM (
SELECT a.id AS accountDbId, a.account_id AS accountCode, a.name AS accountName, a.role AS role, UPPER(c.code) AS currencyCode, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date < #{dateFrom} THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END AS bfPart, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END AS wlPart, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS periodCnt FROM transactions t INNER JOIN account a ON a.id = t.account_id INNER JOIN currency c ON c.id = t.currency_id AND c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.bank_process_posted_id IS NULL AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND t.transaction_type = 'RATE' AND t.from_account_id IS NULL AND t.description = 'RATE_MIDDLEMAN_FEE' AND
AND UPPER(c.code) IN
UPPER(#{code})
AND UPPER(a.role) IN
UPPER(#{cat})
UNION ALL
SELECT a.id AS accountDbId, a.account_id AS accountCode, a.name AS accountName, a.role AS role, UPPER(c.code) AS currencyCode, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date < #{dateFrom} THEN -t.amount ELSE 0 END AS bfPart, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN -t.amount ELSE 0 END AS wlPart, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS periodCnt FROM transactions t INNER JOIN account a ON a.id = t.account_id INNER JOIN currency c ON c.id = t.currency_id AND c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.bank_process_posted_id IS NULL AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND t.transaction_type = 'RATE' AND t.from_account_id IS NOT NULL AND
AND UPPER(c.code) IN
UPPER(#{code})
AND UPPER(a.role) IN
UPPER(#{cat})
UNION ALL
SELECT a.id AS accountDbId, a.account_id AS accountCode, a.name AS accountName, a.role AS role, UPPER(c.code) AS currencyCode, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date < #{dateFrom} THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END AS bfPart, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END AS wlPart, CASE WHEN t.transaction_date >= #{dateFrom} AND t.transaction_date <= #{dateTo} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS periodCnt FROM transactions t INNER JOIN account a ON a.id = t.from_account_id INNER JOIN currency c ON c.id = t.currency_id AND c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.from_account_id IS NOT NULL AND t.bank_process_posted_id IS NULL AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND t.transaction_type = 'RATE' AND
AND UPPER(c.code) IN
UPPER(#{code})
AND UPPER(a.role) IN
UPPER(#{cat})
) x GROUP BY x.accountDbId, x.accountCode, x.accountName, x.role, x.currencyCode ORDER BY currencyCode ASC, accountCode ASC
